---
name: "💡 Request a New Skill"
about: "Suggest a new skill pack for the Nexus Studio template library"
labels: ["skill-request", "community"]
---

## Skill Name
<!-- e.g. "React Query Patterns", "EPAM Design System", "GraphQL Federation" -->

## Category
<!-- e.g. Frontend & UI / Backend & API / Quality (QA) -->

## What problem does this skill solve?
<!-- Describe the gap — what does the AI currently get wrong or miss without this skill? -->

## What should the AI know?
<!-- Key concepts, patterns, code examples, anti-patterns the skill should cover -->

## Who would use this?
<!-- e.g. "Any EPAM frontend team using React Query for server state" -->

## Are you willing to write it?
- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No — requesting someone else writes it
- [ ] Maybe — I need help getting started
